title: Amtech S5670 Swivel Castor Set 4 x 2” (50mm), Wheels for Moving Furniture with 140kg Loading Capacity, Non-Marking
features: The Amtech Swivel castor set can be used as wheels for moving furniture, toolboxes, and storage containers.
These are heavy duty wheels which can rotate 360 degrees and also features a dual brake mechanism, to locks the wheel and swivel simultaneously.
The non-marking and durable PVC castor wheels offer the elasticity of rubber wheels and the toughness of metal wheels.
Contains 2 braked and 2 unbraked 2 inch (50mm) castors with a 35kg load capacity each (140kg in total).
3 inch swivel castor set also available (Amtech S5675) with 300kg load capacity.
description: Product Description With the Amtech Castor Wheel Set, you don’t have to worry about moving furniture or storage containers ain and around the home, office or workshop. Both non-marking and durable for heavy duty usage and simply lock into place when required. These heavy duty castor wheels can also be used on a variety of furniture types, such as tables and bookshelves. Amtech has a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3-year product guarantee. So, keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less. Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No
